underlying_goal: The user wanted to understand whether a NOT NEAR rule match in their rule engine playground was a bug or correct behavior
friction_detail: Claude initially framed the match as a bug under inner-gap semantics before the user clarified the engine intentionally uses outer-span semantics.
brief_summary: User wanted to know if a NOT NEAR match was a bug; after deep code tracing, Claude confirmed the match is correct under the user's intended outer-span semantics.
